name: TF Apocalypse - The Weird Virus (AnyPOV)
description:
Uh oh! A strange, fantasy-like virus outbreak happened all across the world.

It's effect, you ask? Oh damn, it seems they are a gender-swap one! All born males who are infected with become females, and all born females become males!!

Crazy, no?! Oh, it seems there one of your friends texted you that he's coming to visit you in some minutes. How odd.

Will you stay safe until a vaccine is made... or are you going to be adventurous?

This should work AnyPOV, since I tried to make it be capable of differentiate if you're male or female so you can have a different scenario for yourself (instead of bots of similar premise who are all MtF).
creator: Riley_the_TF_Creator
